title: Speech delay concern

investigations.text: Defines developmental and autism screening prompts, parent concern, walking, speech and social domains, and referral pathways for concerning screening results.
investigations.rationale: Supports age-qualified developmental screening and milestone context for speech delay concern; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Defines developmental and autism screening prompts, parent concern, walking, speech and social domains, and referral pathways for concerning screening results.

exact_section.heading: Appendix 5 — Developmental Delays Screening; Appendix 6 — Normal Developmental Milestones

investigations.text: Requires effective record keeping and documentation of screening findings, caregiver education, consent, and refusal.
investigations.rationale: Supports caregiver information and follow-up responsibility for speech delay concern; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Requires effective record keeping and documentation of screening findings, caregiver education, consent, and refusal.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, languages, expressive and receptive milestones, regression, hearing, social communication, development, examination, screening result and referral plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for speech delay concern.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
